claim_bullets.bullet_text: Monsters using magic are more formidable than level suggests, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Monster level indicates event size, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
NPCs as enemies are two levels greater, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).
Special attacks require mental power resistance rolls, (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.235-240).

source_record_text: Chapter 13.6 of the Sword World RPG - Complete Edition covers handling monster special abilities, detailing various attacks and defenses. Not specified.
